mapper.sql: select provider_id, provider_name, provider_code, provider_type, icon, website, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from ai_c_provider
mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_provider (provider_name, provider_code, provider_type, icon, website, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{providerName}, #{providerCode}, #{providerType}, #{icon}, #{website}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update ai_c_provider set provider_name = #{providerName}, provider_code = #{providerCode}, provider_type = #{providerType}, icon = #{icon}, website = #{website}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.delete:
delete from ai_c_provider where provider_id in
#{providerId}
